name: aion
description: Default plugin suite bundled with the framework. Engineering discipline, plugin/skill tooling, project memory management, git workflow, PR review, security audit, MCP-server building, CLI design, deployment, observability, and olympiad math.

plugins.name: md-management
plugins.description: Audit and improve the project memory file (the one auto-loaded each session). Cuts dead content, captures durable session learnings.

plugins.name: math-olympiad
plugins.description: Solve competition math (IMO, Putnam, USAMO, AIME) with adversarial verification that catches errors self-verification misses.

plugins.name: skill-tools
plugins.description: Create, review, and benchmark skills. Includes skill-creator, skill-reviewer agent, and skill-grader agent.

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Build plugins. Skills for each component type, a validator agent, and a /create-plugin scaffolder.

plugins.name: core-skills
plugins.description: Engineering discipline: brainstorming, TDD, debugging, verification, planning, code review, parallel-agent dispatching.

plugins.name: doctor
plugins.description: Health-check the install — config dir, plugin load failures, marketplace state, memory git, hook validity. Surfaces what's broken before debugging blind.

plugins.name: git-tools
plugins.description: Git workflow toolkit: commit-message craft, conflict resolution, branch hygiene, /clean-gone command.

plugins.name: pr-toolkit
plugins.description: PR review toolkit. Silent-failure hunter, test-coverage analyzer, type-design analyzer, /review-pr orchestrator.

plugins.name: security-review
plugins.description: Security audit of diffs and codebases. Hunts secrets, injection, auth bypass, crypto mistakes, code-from-data. Severity-calibrated.

plugins.name: mcp-server-dev
plugins.description: Build MCP servers from scratch — transport selection, tool surface, resource surface, error handling, lifecycle.

plugins.name: cli-design
plugins.description: Design good CLI tools — help text, subcommand structure, flag conventions, error messages, output discipline, exit codes.

plugins.name: deployment
plugins.description: Ship code. Dockerfile craft, CI configuration, release tagging and versioning.

plugins.name: observability
plugins.description: Structured logging, tracing, metrics. Production-grade instrumentation without the usual pitfalls.
